prompt: I have a new bank account with a bank I haven't used before. The statement is at /Statements/Personal/You/Banks/NewBank-March-2026.csv. Can you learn its format and add it to the mapping so future statements are automatically parsed?

assertions.text: Format auto-detection - Successfully identifies key columns without manual input
assertions.evidence: Both solutions auto-detect columns; with-skill achieves 0.86 confidence

assertions.text: Format mapping persistence - Stored in .statement-formats.json with >0.8 confidence
assertions.evidence: With-skill stores mapping; without-skill demonstrates equivalent persistence mechanism

assertions.text: Zero future manual effort - Future statements parse automatically
assertions.evidence: Format cached for instant future processing; with-skill demonstrates complete automation

assertions.text: High parsing accuracy - 100% transaction parsing success
assertions.evidence: 16/16 transactions parsed successfully in both implementations

assertions.text: Learn-once approach - Eliminates repetitive format setup
assertions.evidence: With-skill clearly demonstrates this pattern; without-skill requires manual format re-entry
